sizing_rule.note: Risk 2.5% max per trade (primary constraint). Position size allocation at 3% of capital. Stop protection minimum 3.5% of entry price. Based on Van Tharp snow fight metaphor: initial protection level + capital allocation are the dual sizing anchors.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must incorporate two factors from the snow fight metaphor: initial protection level and starting capital allocation, because money management (not entry selection) is the primary driver of trading performance.
